prompt: Write the chords as an arpeggio — each note of the chord plays one after another as 8th notes ascending.

args.content:

  plugin mini
  strip console1

ch 2 Bass

  strip console1

ch 3 Chords

ch 4 Kick

ch 5 Snare
  plugin drums

ch 6 HiHat

arr verse 4 chorus 4
